age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation commensurate with educational qualification(s) and/or experience(s) of the applicant may be considered for applicant(s) having qualification and experience higher than the advertised with the prior approval of the competent authority.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. / B.Tech in Life sciences / Biotechnology / Bioengineering with minimum 70% marks / equivalent grade
qualification.details: Project Associate-I: M.Sc. / B.Tech in Life sciences / Biotechnology / Bioengineering with minimum 70% marks / equivalent grade. Prior experience in molecular biology and genetics techniques is a must. Prior experience in handling microscopes and imaging, specifically confocal microscope will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Rs.37,000 + 30% HRA per month for candidate having valid CSIR-NET / GATE / DBT - JRF / any other National Level Test conducted by Central Government Departments and their agencies OR equivalent scorecard. Rs.30,000 + 30% HRA per month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Pune to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IISER Pune Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate-I position at IISER Pune is 30th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. or B.Tech degree in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, or Bioengineering with a minimum of 70% marks or an equivalent grade. Prior experience in molecular biology and genetics is essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates with higher qualifications and experience, subject to the approval of the competent authority.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 37,000 per month, plus 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-I position at IISER Pune.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Project Associate-I position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Pune, Maharashtra. While the official notification doesn't explicitly restrict applications based on state of residence, candidates should ensure they can fulfill the job requirements at the specified location.
